chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1942 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.7251/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 25-09-2025 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Kashif Hussain Memon, Assistant Education Officer (Primary) Ghotki at Mirpur Mathelo and Lal Muhammad Tunio, District Education Officer (ES&HS) Ghotki >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition and submits that the Petitioner being a civil servant will avail his alternate remedy before the appropriate forum in accordance with the law. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
